---
title: "differential_abundance"
output: html_document
---

# Differential Abundance Analysis using ANCOMBC2

## Loading in Packages

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(phyloseq)
library(ANCOMBC)
library(microbiome)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggrepel)
```

Wrangling steps

```{r}
ps = readRDS('../processed_data/phyloseq_taxonomy.rds')
```

```{r}
# setting seed
set.seed(412)


ps_genus = tax_glom(ps, 'Genus')

temp_relab = transform(ps_genus, 'compositional')
temp_filt = filter_taxa(temp_relab, function(x) mean(x) >= 0.0001, TRUE)

ps_filt = prune_taxa(taxa_names(temp_filt),ps_genus)
ps_filt
```

# HA Subtypes

## Running ANCOMBC2 Analysis

```{r}
ha_out = ancombc2(data = ps_filt, 
               fix_formula = 'ha_group', 
               p_adj_method = 'BH',
               prv_cut = 0.3) # increased due to small sample size

ha_statistical_table = ha_out$res
view(ha_statistical_table)
```

## Volcano Plots

```{r}
### H1 vs H2 ### 
ha_statistical_table$association_ = ifelse(ha_statistical_table$q_ha_group2 < 0.05 & ha_statistical_table$lfc_ha_group2 > 0, "Enriched", "Not significant")
ha_statistical_table$association = ifelse(ha_statistical_table$q_ha_group2 < 0.05 & ha_statistical_table$lfc_ha_group2 < 0, "Depleted",ha_statistical_table$association)

volcano_plot <- ggplot(ha_statistical_table, aes(x = as.numeric(lfc_ha_group2), y = -log10(as.numeric(q_ha_group2)), color = association)) +
  geom_point() +
  labs(x = "Log2 Fold Change", y = "-log10(p-value)",
       title = "Volcano Plot") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray") +
  theme_bw()


volcano_plot
```
